rawPrepareEffectParam.comment_bpcHotFactor: specifies the threshold for a hot pixel value to be selected for correction. A higher value results in fewer pixels detected as bad pixels.
rawPrepareEffectParam.comment_bpcOffsetMax: specifies the offset threshold for a hot pixel detection. A higher value results in fewer pixels detected as bad pixels.
rawPrepareEffectParam.comment_bpcColdFactor: specifies the threshold for a cold pixel value to be selected for correction. A lower value results in fewer pixels detected as bad pixels.
rawPrepareEffectParam.comment_bpcOffsetMin: specifies the offset threshold for a cold pixel detection. A higher value results in fewer pixels detected as bad pixels.
rawPrepareEffectParam.comment_highlightDetectThresh: A smaller value means that fewer pixels will be reset as 'highlight pixel' after correction.
rawPrepareEffectParam.comment_highlightValueThresh: only those pixels with value higher than the threshold can be highlight pixel.

ainrEffectParam.comment_ainrDrcGainCompansation: drc compansation for ainr, higher value means stronger denoise

0.evScaleComment: the weight of noise map estimate

noiseestimationEffectParam.comment_noisesigma: noise sigma for range filter if bypass noise estimation
noiseestimationEffectParam.comment_percentage threshold: noise estimation percentage threshold according to ISO value

fusionEffectParam.comment_highFrequencyCoefThreshold: coef ratio between high frequency and low frequency, only for wavelet fusion
